aadhaar_bank_link.title: Linking Aadhaar with Bank Account
aadhaar_bank_link.short_response: You can link your Aadhaar with your bank account either online or by visiting your bank or an Akshaya center near you.
step_by_step: First, make sure your mobile number is linked with Aadhaar.
Next, visit your bank branch or an Akshaya center.
Provide your Aadhaar number and bank account details.
Verify using the OTP sent to your registered mobile number.
After verification, Aadhaar will be linked to your bank account.
important_notes: Your mobile number must be active and linked with Aadhaar.
Details should exactly match bank records.
aadhaar_bank_link.tts_text: Here is a simple explanation on how to link Aadhaar with your bank account, and where you can go nearby for help.

podcast_mode.speaker: Person A
podcast_mode.text: Many people are unsure where to link Aadhaar with their bank account.

podcast_mode.speaker: Person B
podcast_mode.text: Yes, they can either visit their bank or the nearest Akshaya center for help.

update.title: New Government Update
update.message: The deadline for Aadhaar–bank linking has been extended till December 31.
